name: Neyx Tag (Remake is out now, servers are being shut down 7/2/2023)

reviews.review_description: Met the owner of the game he is really nice and he is re doing the game 100000000000000/10!!!!!

I don’t know what else to do defo a 1/10
I can’t join with friends no wonder there’s barely anything to do

developer_response.body: You can hangout with friends, get out the map and fall for however long you want, you can also just mess around. Hope this was helpful!

reviews.review_description: I haven't played but I know this is gonna be a W game
This is a quite fun game to play with friends 10/10
Bad game every person is toxic and there’s nothing to do

reviews.review_title: I don't really like this game
reviews.review_description: Because this game only had grass music 2 trees a mirror double walls walls and a skybase

Boring and the 
mods are rude and annoying

developer_response.body: sad to hear, i will demote the rude people.

reviews.review_description: I haven’t played yet but I read all the reviews and all the toxicity and I don’t like that and I would like to help. Can I tryout for moderator?

Now I don’t like this game personally it’s good for like pinch climbing sometimes but it’s all it is that ￼ there’s not really a bunch of people there and the last time I played this they were like toxic people in the owner but like he was claiming to be an owner, and he was saying oh, like being rude, and under was another person on the server that was also being rude like and he sounded like I don’t know 16 or 15 but he was being extremely toxic and he had platforms and yeah like parent I would probably say people might like this game and they had a little bit more stuff but if I could could you give me moderator or somethings cause I’m trying to get rid of like all the bad people now want some positive stuff in that game because every time that I’ll join in it I’ll always make somebody toxic. But thank you for looking if you are looking at this please for using your time just to look at this appreciate it bye

developer_response.body:
Thank you for thhe feedback! I plan to remove any toxicity or inpersonating from the remake making use of bans. I also plan to add more things to the remake.

-Nexy
